displayTitle: Legacy #22: The Wrath of the Dragon
synopsis: In light of recent events, Darth Krayt deems it time to teach a lesson in obedience-to the entire galaxy! Emperor Krayt is displeased, and the price of betrayal will be exacted from an entire race, their suffering rippling to the edges of the Outer Rim. Yet his wrath will not stop there, as even among his own ranks failure will be dealt with cruelly and with lasting results. Old allegiances will be tested, and new bonds will be formed through pain and anger. This is what happens when the Sith rule the galaxy! The unfettered fury of the Sith!
title: Legacy #22: The Wrath of the Dragon
